case_title: HOLLY WU VS. CALVIN MOON ZHEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, HOLLY
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF WU, HOLLY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE WAIVED) SERVED FEB-04-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHEN, CALVIN MOON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF HOLLY WU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT CALVIN MOON ZHEN IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DEFENDANTS DANIEL LUENG AND MAN K. LUENG. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES HER CASE AGAINST THE UNSERVED DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, HOLLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHEN, CALVIN MOON $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, THE CASE AGAINST DANIEL LUENG AND MAN K. LUENG IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZHEN, CALVIN MOON
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, HOLLY AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, MAN K.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2022 - JUDGMENT.
